mapper.sql: id, code, invite_scene, status, issued_to_mobile, issued_by_user_id, used_by_user_id, issued_time, used_time, expires_time, note, create_time, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM invite_codes WHERE code = #{code} AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE invite_codes SET invite_scene = #{inviteScene}, status = #{status}, issued_to_mobile = #{issuedToMobile}, issued_by_user_id = #{issuedByUserId}, used_by_user_id = #{usedByUserId}, issued_time = #{issuedTime}, used_time = #{usedTime}, expires_time = #{expiresTime}, note = #{note}, update_time = #{updateTime}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM invite_codes
ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
